prose.en: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and applications with the following exceptions: {param:sc-15_odp} ; and

parameters.name: sc-15_odp
parameters.label: exceptions where remote activation is to be allowed

prose.en: Provide an explicit indication of use to users physically present at the devices.

guidance.en: Collaborative computing devices and applications include remote meeting devices and applications, networked white boards, cameras, and microphones. The explicit indication of use includes signals to users when collaborative computing devices and applications are activated.

prose.en: remote activation of collaborative computing devices and applications is prohibited except {param:sc-15_odp};
an explicit indication of use is provided to users physically present at the devices.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with responsibilities for managing collaborative computing devices
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the management of remote activation of collaborative computing devices
mechanisms providing an indication of use of collaborative computing devices

guidelines.en: exceptions where remote activation is to be allowed are defined;
